description:
Batch 1/5 — Core Pool Infrastructure (2 of 3)

Create AgentPool struct in a new daemon_agent_pool.rs module:

- Pool owns a tokio::sync::Semaphore with N permits (pool_size from --max-agents / AO_MAX_AGENTS)
- spawn_agent(slot: AgentSlot) acquires a permit, spawns the agent as a tokio task, releases permit on completion
- Agent completion sends result through an mpsc channel back to the coordinator
- Pool tracks: active count, total spawned, total completed, total failed
- Pool exposes: try_spawn (non-blocking, returns false if full), drain (stop accepting, wait for running), active_count(), is_full()
- AgentPool::new(pool_size: usize) -> Self

The pool does NOT decide what to run — it only manages concurrency bounds. The coordinator (next task) decides what to feed it. Depends on AgentSlot extraction task.
title: Implement bounded agent pool with tokio semaphore
